overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse along stormy coastal cliffs and through mountainous forests. The scene features heavy rain, dark atmospheric lighting, and transitions from open cliffside paths to dense woodland and rocky valleys.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: Geralt riding Roach along a narrow cliffside path during a heavy storm, staying close to the inland side away from the cliff edge

entered.detail: rough wooden posts connected by rope lining the inland side of the path
steep coastal cliff dropping down to the ocean below
dark turbulent clouds with visible rain streaks
gnarled tree silhouetted against the stormy sky
dark churning sea visible beyond the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy coastal cliffside path with wooden fence posts lining the inland side. Geralt rides Roach along the narrow dirt trail as heavy rain falls, with the ocean visible far below to the right and dark clouds filling the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain trail at cliff edge

events.description: path enters forested area with coniferous trees becoming prominent along the mountainside

agents.ego_description: continuing to ride along the mountain path as the environment transitions from open cliffs to forest edge, navigating gentle turns

notable_agents.action: deer standing alert near the path edge, watching the horse approach before moving away

entered.detail: dense pine and spruce trees covering the mountainside
towering evergreen trees lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path transitions from open cliffside to forested mountain terrain as coniferous trees begin to dominate the left side. A deer appears on the right, alert to the horse's presence, while the cliff edge remains visible but closer to the path.

agents.ego_description: riding through the dense forest interior, navigating the winding trail among tall pines with reduced visibility from the canopy cover

notable_agents.action: deer grazing near the forest edge before moving deeper into the woods

entered.detail: thick overhead cover of pine branches blocking the stormy sky
dense low vegetation and ferns lining the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The trail winds through dense forest with tall pines creating a canopy overhead that shelters the path from the worst of the rain. Underbrush lines the trail edges and deer are visible grazing in the deeper woods to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain pass with distant ruins

events.description: exiting dense forest into open rocky landscape with distant mountain structures becoming visible

agents.ego_description: emerging from the forest onto rocky terrain, continuing along the mountain path with ancient ruins visible in the far distance

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders and rock formations lining the path
ancient stone structures perched on a distant mountain peak, partially obscured by mist
deep valley between mountain peaks with fog settling in the lower areas

segments.scene_description: The forest gives way to open rocky terrain as the path emerges onto a mountainside with expansive views. Large rock outcrops line the trail while distant castle ruins become visible through the mist in the valley ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky valley with steep cliff walls

agents.ego_description: riding through a narrow rocky pass flanked by steep cliff faces on both sides, approaching the distant ruins

entered.detail: vertical rock face rising immediately beside the path
tall rocky cliffs forming the valley walls

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a rocky valley with steep cliff walls rising on both sides. The distant ruins appear closer as the camera moves through the pass, with the terrain becoming more rugged and enclosed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy coastal trail that gradually transitions into a dense mountain forest. It begins on a narrow dirt path lined with wooden fence posts, where Geralt rides Roach through heavy rain under a canopy of dark clouds with the ocean visible far below. As the camera advances, the open cliffside begins to close in, and the landscape shifts toward rugged mountain terrain. The scene then expands into a wooded area as coniferous trees begin to dominate the left side of the path, just as an alert deer appears on the right. Finally, the camera continues forward, moving deeper into the forest while the cliff edge remains visible but closer to the trail.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sheltered forest canopy into an expansive mountainside and finally into a narrow, rugged valley. It begins on a winding trail through dense pines and underbrush, where grazing deer are visible in the deeper woods. As the forest gives way, the path emerges onto open rocky terrain, shifting the perspective to expansive views of the mountainside and distant castle ruins shrouded in mist. The scene then narrows as the camera moves through a rocky pass, with steep cliff walls rising on both sides to enclose the landscape. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rugged as the distant ruins draw closer through the tightening valley.
